Formula: E<> attack_mode == NO_ATTACK and client_bootstrapped[0] and client_bootstrapped[1]
E<> attack_mode == MITM_ATTACK and (message_tampered[0] or message_tampered[1])
E<> (attack_mode == FAKE_BS_ATTACK and client_bs_type[0] == 2 and client_state[0] == CLIENT_STATE_ERROR)
E<> (attack_mode == FAKE_BS_ATTACK and client_bs_type[1] == 2 and client_state[1] == CLIENT_STATE_ERROR)
A[] (attack_mode == FAKE_BS_ATTACK and client_bootstrapped[0] imply client_bs_type[0] == 1)
A[] (attack_mode == FAKE_BS_ATTACK and client_bootstrapped[1] imply client_bs_type[1] == 1)
E<> attack_mode == TAMPER_NOTIFY and (notification_tampered[0] or notification_tampered[1])
E<> attack_mode == TAMPER_NOTIFY and (notification_tampered[0] or notification_tampered[1])
E<> (oscore_enabled and attack_mode == NO_ATTACK and ObservationHandler1.S_COMPLETED)

A[] forall(c: client_id_t) 
        (client_registered[c] imply 
         server_last_msg_id[c] >= client_message_id[c])

E<> (attack_mode == NO_ATTACK and 
         forall(c: client_id_t) client_registered[c])

E<> (attack_mode == REPLAY_ATTACK and 
         exists(c: client_id_t) client_registered[c])
A[] (attack_mode == REPLAY_ATTACK and replay_message_detected imply attack_detected)

E<> (attack_mode == DOS_ATTACK and 
         attack_counter >= MAX_ATTACKS and dos_throttling_active)

E<> (attack_mode == DOS_ATTACK and !dos_throttling_active and 
         exists(c: client_id_t) client_registered[c])

A[] forall(c: client_id_t)

E<> (attack_mode == REPLAY_ATTACK and 
         exists(c: client_id_t) client_registered[c])
A[] (attack_mode == REPLAY_ATTACK and replay_message_detected imply attack_detected)

E<> (attack_mode == DOS_ATTACK and 
         attack_counter >= MAX_ATTACKS and dos_throttling_active)

E<> (attack_mode == DOS_ATTACK and !dos_throttling_active and
